title: buildah bud --label functionality missing
body:
**Description**
`buildah bud --label` is missing and needs to be provided.  This is functionality that Docker has.

#599 is the parent issue for this issue.

**Output of `buildah version`:**

Buildah v0.16

comments.body: Is this just doing the same thing as the LABEL flag in a dockerfile?

Hi, i'am very interested in the feature, when this functionality will be released ?

Thanks you

Hi, 
i agree, i'm very interested too. 
when do you plan to publish the next version?
Soon.  #721.  With luck a kit should be out in the testing repos for Fedora next week.
